prose.en: Report the results of security and privacy function verification to {param:si-06.03_odp}.

guidance.en: Organizational personnel with potential interest in the results of the verification of security and privacy functions include systems security officers, senior agency information security officers, and senior agency officials for privacy.

prose.en: the results of security function verification are reported to {param:si-06.03_odp};
the results of privacy function verification are reported to {param:si-06.03_odp}.

objects.en: procedures addressing security and privacy function verification
system configuration settings and associated documentation
reports of security and privacy function verification results
Organizational personnel with security and privacy function verification responsibilities
organizational personnel who are recipients of security and privacy function verification reports
organizational personnel with information security and privacy responsibilities
Organizational processes for reporting security and privacy function verification results
mechanisms supporting and/or implementing the reporting of security and privacy function verification results

guidelines.en: personnel or roles designated to receive the results of security and privacy function verification is/are defined;
